fraudster_actions.name: phishing
fraudster_actions.description: A fraudster collects victim information through phishing, data breaches, social media, or malware.

fraudster_actions.name: email_trap
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster sends deceptive emails or messages designed to lure the victim into clicking a malicious link or revealing sensitive account information.

fraudster_actions.name: credential_jacking
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster steals the victim’s login credentials or authentication data through phishing, malware, or other deceptive means.

fraudster_actions.name: social_engineering
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster manipulates the victim through deception, urgency, or impersonation to obtain sensitive information or induce a risky action.

fraudster_actions.name: account_impersonation
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudster impersonates the victim's bank or institution to gain access to their account information.

fraudster_actions.name: payment_link_redirect
fraudster_actions.description: Redirects payment links to fraudulent accounts.

fraudster_actions.name: victim_info_exploitation
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster uses personal or account-related information about the victim to make scams more convincing and improve the chances of account compromise.

fraudster_actions.name: password_promise
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster persuades the victim to share or reset account passwords by making false promises or posing as a trusted party.

fraudster_actions.name: credential_snatch
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster captures the victim’s account credentials directly through a scam interaction, fake interface, or malicious communication channel.

fraudster_actions.name: data_spoofing
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster falsifies or manipulates information shown to the victim in order to appear legitimate and encourage disclosure of sensitive data.

fraudster_actions.name: account_takeover_impersonation
fraudster_actions.description: Attackers use social engineering to impersonate bank employees and gain access to victim's accounts.

fraudster_actions.name: social_engineering_attack
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster conducts a targeted manipulation attempt to pressure the victim into sharing account information, authentication codes, or sending money.

fraudster_actions.name: identity_fraud_scheme
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster uses stolen or fabricated identity information to impersonate the victim and gain access to accounts or financial services.

fraudster_actions.name: unauthorized_account_takeover
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster gains control of the victim’s account without permission by using stolen credentials, intercepted authentication factors, or identity data.

fraudster_actions.name: phishing_attack
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster sends phishing messages that trick the victim into visiting a fake site or disclosing sensitive account information.

fraudster_actions.name: transaction_malicious_link_click
fraudster_actions.description: Victim clicks on malicious link embedded in email or SMS, which leads to a fake payment page where they enter their login credentials.

fraudster_actions.name: spear_phishing
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster sends a highly targeted phishing message tailored to the victim in order to steal credentials or other sensitive information.

fraudster_actions.name: account_impersonation_spear
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster uses targeted impersonation of a bank, merchant, or trusted contact to convince the victim to reveal account information.

fraudster_actions.name: victims_info_promise
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster offers false assistance, rewards, or protection in order to persuade the victim to disclose personal or financial information.

fraudster_actions.name: account_reconnaissance
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster gathers preliminary information about the victim’s account, behavior, or banking relationships to prepare for a later scam or takeover attempt.

fraudster_actions.name: unverified_payment_request
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster sends a payment request through a fast payment channel without legitimate justification, hoping the victim will approve it.

fraudster_actions.name: account_compromise
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster obtains access to the victim’s account or sensitive account information, enabling unauthorized actions or future transfers.

fraudster_actions.name: false_identity_creation
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster creates a fake identity, company, or profile to appear trustworthy and support later fraud or account manipulation.

fraudster_actions.name: victims_data_exploitation
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters use victim data to steal personal info.

fraudster_actions.name: malware_drop
fraudster_actions.description: The fraudster delivers or installs malware on the victim’s device to capture credentials, monitor activity, or enable unauthorized access to financial accounts.

fraudster_actions.name: initiate_fast_transfer_to_fraudster_account
fraudster_actions.description: The victim initiates a fast payment to an account controlled by the fraudster, believing it to be legitimate.

fraudster_actions.name: transfer_funds_to_safe_account_requested_by_caller
fraudster_actions.description: The victim transfers funds to a so-called safe account as instructed by a caller impersonating the bank or government.

fraudster_actions.name: chain_fast_transfers_through_mule_merchants
fraudster_actions.description: Fraudsters rapidly move stolen funds through multiple mule merchant accounts to obfuscate the money trail.
